notes: Deploy Wizard staged-rollout deployment notifications. Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. Deployment card = header (🚀 Deployment — <artifact/version>) + section(fields) for Target/Strategy/Package/Compliance + a rollout-stages section using 🟢 (in progress) / ⚪ (held) markers for Canary → 10% → Fleet + a context footer noting the approval gate. Pair with a 'paused at production gate' card to stage a blocked-on-manager-approval beat. Fits deployment/release channels.

examples.name: staged_rollout_started
examples.when: A staged rollout begins with a canary wave; later stages held behind an approval gate.

text.text: 🚀 Deployment — Toyota Audio Multimedia OTA v2026.28.0

elements.text: Prod gate requires manager approval before promoting past canary

examples.name: rollout_paused_at_gate
examples.when: The canary is healthy but promotion to production is blocked at the manager approval gate.

text.text: Canary cohort is green. Promotion to the *10% → fleet* production rollout is blocked at the manager approval gate.

elements.text: Approve to resume · abandon to re-queue next cycle
